title: Delium
description: Delium is a Simple, Lightweight and Fast Fabric-based Minecraft modpack that boosts FPS and improves graphics
body:
# Delium is coming back soon. meanwhile, check out [Actium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/actium).
**Delium is a Fabric-based Minecraft modpack that will take your gaming experience to the next level. It gives you the best mods for FPS boosting, giving you a smooth and stunning gameplay.**

## ­Ъїі Pure Optimization
Get higher FPS thanks to mods that optimize the game engine, reduce lag, and fix bugs. Enjoy faster chunk loading, smoother animations, and less memory usage without any extra features.

## ­ЪЦе Features

### Fixed Bugs
Delium has mods that fix what minecraft didn't fix so you can keep your gameplay non-buggy and smooth.

### Up to date
Delium is up to date so people can use it on the latest minecraft version! In the maintime new minecraft updates are being worked on, We work on adding support to other version like (1.18, 1.17, 1.16)

## ­ЪЈ« Extra Features
[Actium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/actium) is another modpack by the same creators of [Delium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/delium) for users that want to replace optifine or want more features for a better gameplay. 

## РЮЊ FAQ
> **Q:** Does this modpack include extra features that are not in vanilla minecraft?                                    
> **A:** No, This modpack only includes optimization mods and fixes bugs so you can have a better experience.

## Extra Information
<details>
<summary>Actium Version System</summary>

## Version System

### Version = [2MCVER].[3MCVER].[4MCVER]+[ACTIUMVER]
- First Minecraft Version Number = [1MCVER]
- Second Minecraft Version Number = [2MCVER]
- Third Minecraft Version Number = [3MCVER]
- Fourth Minecraft Version Number (ZERO IF DOESN'T EXIST) = [4MCVER]
- Actium Version Number = [ACTIUMVER]

```
Example 1:
- Minecraft Version 1.23.4
- 2nd Actium Release

Version = 2.3.4+2 = 2.3.6

Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»Рј»
```
